author: mark
text:
Master wins for plugin config under master_url

When master_url is set, the hub becomes authoritative for plugin policy: the effective plugins map and per-plugin config files are read from the materialized state-repo, not the project root. A one-shot drift warning fires when project-side plugins linger so operators know to migrate.

Standalone repos (no master_url) are byte-identical to pre-bl-a7d9: same plugins map, same paths, no warning.

Closes the architectural question from bl-ffb4: client repos no longer override hub plugin policy, eliminating the N-secrets / N-syncs / drifting-mirroring-policy fragmentation that the bridge pattern (bl-bfb7) is built to prevent.
